overview.Name: Doximity Inc
overview.Description: Doximity, Inc. (Ticker: DOCS) is a U.S. healthcare technology company that operates a digital platform tailored for medical professionals. The company’s cloud-based network provides secure communication and collaboration tools, telemedicine services, clinical workflow solutions, and access to medical news, research, and career-management features for physicians, nurse practitioners, physician assistants, and other clinicians. Headquartered in San Francisco, California, Doximity’s Class A common stock trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker DOCS.
overview.Address: 500 3RD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, UNITED STATES, 94107
